category_sources: source_facts.description says this is the official Monero wallet and CPU miner; official Monero repository describes Monero as a private, secure, untraceable decentralized digital currency.
display_name_sources: source_facts.name is monero; official getmonero.org and monero-project repository use the display name Monero.
docs_sources: Official Monero documentation is hosted at docs.getmonero.org; the official docs include a monero-wallet-cli reference for this package's CLI wallet.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo is empty; official monero-project/monero README lists GitHub as https://github.com/monero-project/monero and describes it as the core Monero implementation.
tags_sources: source_facts.description identifies official wallet and CPU miner; official Monero repository describes privacy, security, decentralization, and cryptocurrency functionality.
